title: arctotis perfoliata
intro: Arctotis perfoliata, also known as the Cape daisy or cape marigold, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits are said to include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Arctotis perfoliata is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
